proof_boundary: This is a packaged pilot offer built from repo artifacts, desk research, and proof-kit readiness. It is not buyer validation, hosted proof, enterprise-security proof, or prediction-accuracy proof.

pilot_offer.name: Governed Strategic Intelligence Pilot
pilot_offer.primary_buyer: Enterprise or public-sector strategy, risk, foresight, geopolitical, or analyst-workflow owner
pilot_offer.promise: Reduce the time and ambiguity between source evidence and decision-ready strategic options while preserving provenance, uncertainty, human review, and forecastability.
pilot_offer.proof_boundary: This is a packaged pilot offer built from repo artifacts, desk research, and proof-kit readiness. It is not buyer validation, hosted proof, enterprise-security proof, or prediction-accuracy proof.
allowed_claims: evidence-backed actor reasoning and countermove workflow
human-review and forecast-governance aware decision support
pilot_scope: Select one high-stakes strategic question and one buyer team.
Run source-to-brief-to-review-to-forecast workflow on 3 to 5 representative cases.
Document evidence quality, review blockers, decision actions, and forecastability for each case.
End with a buyer decision: no fit, internal follow-up, paid pilot discussion, LOI path, or procurement path.
success_criteria: At least three qualified buyer follow-ups from the target slate.
At least one paid-pilot, LOI, or procurement-path conversation.
Hosted proof attached for the demo route used in the pilot.
No market copy uses prediction-superiority language before approved resolved-outcome scoring.

niche_offer_sequence.buyer_job: Turn ambiguous geopolitical, policy, supplier, or operational risk questions into evidence-backed briefs, countermove maps, review states, and scoreable forecast drafts.
proof_assets: Strategist/enterprise workflow route and function evidence
niche_offer_sequence.sale_boundary: guided pilot only; no commercial-ready or prediction-superiority claim

niche_offer_sequence.buyer_job: Link research evidence, human review, forecast governance, Brier scoring, and resolved-outcome learning.
niche_offer_sequence.sale_boundary: do not sell accuracy until owner-approved resolved outcomes and real baselines are scored

niche_offer_sequence.niche: Geopolitical risk radar and scenario monitor
niche_offer_sequence.buyer_job: Monitor external risk signals and convert them into actor-aware strategic prompts and scenarios.
niche_offer_sequence.sale_boundary: requires hosted non-simulated feed proof and freshness/SLA labels before production claims

niche_offer_sequence.buyer_job: Package the same evidence/review/forecast workflow for executives, analysts, and governance reviewers.
niche_offer_sequence.sale_boundary: use as demo narrative, not standalone enterprise platform claim

niche_offer_sequence.buyer_job: Train managers, students, and analysts on negotiation, game trees, and forecasting discipline with structured debriefs.
niche_offer_sequence.sale_boundary: requires classroom hosted smoke and buyer-specific curriculum proof before packaging as training product

covered_niches: Geopolitical risk radar and scenario monitor
substitution_matrix.buyer_strength: real-time monitoring, source depth, location and country-risk intelligence
substitution_matrix.app_differentiator: turns evidence into actor reasoning, countermoves, human review state, and forecast-draft governance
substitution_matrix.avoid_claim: do not claim better raw intelligence coverage without hosted source/freshness proof

substitution_matrix.buyer_strength: enterprise ontology, operational context, security, and action workflows
substitution_matrix.app_differentiator: narrower, faster guided pilot around decision-quality workflow for strategy/risk teams
substitution_matrix.avoid_claim: do not claim full enterprise ontology, private deployment, or scaled integration proof

substitution_matrix.buyer_strength: forecasting communities, training, custom forecasting services, and benchmarkable probability discipline
substitution_matrix.app_differentiator: bridges source research, strategist brief, review gates, and governed forecast creation
substitution_matrix.avoid_claim: do not claim world-class accuracy before resolved-outcome and baseline evidence

substitution_matrix.buyer_strength: structured scenario thinking and anticipatory governance
substitution_matrix.app_differentiator: operationalizes foresight into evidence bundles, review states, and scoreable follow-up questions
substitution_matrix.avoid_claim: do not reduce foresight to single-future prediction

substitution_matrix.buyer_strength: facilitated learning, classroom credibility, and reusable debrief structure
substitution_matrix.app_differentiator: links negotiation practice to game-tree reasoning, evidence review, forecast discipline, and analyst workflow handoff
substitution_matrix.avoid_claim: do not claim training product-market fit before hosted classroom smoke and buyer-specific curriculum proof

buyer_fit_checklist.qualification_question: Do you have recurring decisions where geopolitical, supplier, cyber, policy, or market signals must be turned into an executive-ready action recommendation?
buyer_fit_checklist.pass_signal: Named team owns the workflow and can provide 3 to 5 representative cases.
buyer_fit_checklist.disqualifier: No current decision owner or no willingness to show the current workflow.

buyer_fit_checklist.qualification_question: Do you need plausible-futures analysis linked to evidence, review, and follow-up forecast questions?
buyer_fit_checklist.pass_signal: Buyer values scenario reasoning and governance over single-future prediction.
buyer_fit_checklist.disqualifier: Buyer demands automated prediction superiority before workflow evaluation.

buyer_fit_checklist.qualification_question: Can you supply resolved binary questions and comparable baseline forecasts for scoring?
buyer_fit_checklist.pass_signal: Owner can provide at least 25 approved resolved rows for one scored source.
buyer_fit_checklist.disqualifier: No resolved outcome data or baseline source is available.
buyer_fit_checklist.owner_input_needed: approved resolved forecast export and comparable baseline

buyer_fit_checklist.qualification_question: Is your problem source overload plus decision handoff, rather than only event monitoring?
buyer_fit_checklist.pass_signal: Buyer needs actor reasoning, countermoves, and decision logs after external signals.
buyer_fit_checklist.disqualifier: Buyer only wants raw location alerts or intelligence-feed replacement.

buyer_fit_checklist.qualification_question: Do managers or analysts need applied negotiation, game tree, or forecasting training tied to measurable debriefs?
buyer_fit_checklist.pass_signal: Buyer can pilot with one cohort and a concrete decision-skill rubric.
buyer_fit_checklist.disqualifier: Buyer wants a generic course marketplace rather than applied organizational cases.

required_proof_before_upgrade: Complete the selected buyer discovery calls and record buyer role, proof shown, objection, next action, willingness-to-pay signal, and evidence quality.
Attach hosted smoke evidence through the hosted operational proof kit.
Owner-approve and test the first RLS policy batch before enterprise/private-data claims.
Score owner-approved resolved forecasts against real comparable baselines before prediction-accuracy claims.

current_source_alignment.implication: The offer should sell governed, measured, managed AI decision support rather than unsupported autonomous prediction claims.
Enterprise/public-sector pilot material must show security and deployment proof gates, not only product features.
The market already buys geopolitical intelligence for operational risk, so differentiation must be decision-workflow governance rather than raw event monitoring.
Operational AI buyers expect decision-context integration, security, and action workflows; this app should position as a narrower evidence-to-forecast pilot, not a full ontology platform.
Forecasting is a real service market, but accuracy claims require resolved outcomes and benchmarked baselines.
Forecasting and decision-skill training is a credible adjacent lane, but it should not distract from the first enterprise/public-sector decision workflow wedge.
World-class prediction language needs dynamic, comparable, resolved-outcome evaluation rather than sample fixtures.
Public-sector foresight buyers value structured exploration of plausible futures, not single-future prediction.

current_blockers: Hosted proof kit status is hosted_proof_kit_ready_not_hosted_proof with 12 planned checks.
Accuracy intake status is accuracy_intake_ready_not_accuracy_proof with 6 acceptance gates.
RLS draft status is policy_draft_not_applied with 3 open owner decisions.
